posts.text:
New episode: Building a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline with @maya_chen — five stages, one output bundle, zero heroics. The pipeline is the product.

https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen

Key takeaway from Ep 14: a transcript is a rich input, not editorial truth. Automate drafts, not approvals. Start here:

https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
